'''Puth''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Nimbanel/Legends|Nimbanel]], who lived around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. Earning a living as an [[Accountant/Legends|accountant]], Puth worked for the infamous [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]. Fett often made use of Puth's financial knowledge when buying [[stock market]] shares, and relied on the Nimbanel accountant to manage his accumulated fortune, paying him a significant sum of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to ensure confidentiality in his affairs. Puth was also capable of laundering money and erasing audit trails with great proficiency.

{{Char-stub}}
